title: Clinical Research Coordinator
description: IQVIA is the world's leading contract research organization, powered by technology and driven by the mission to accelerate the development of innovative treatments that improve patient outcomes globally. We partner with life sciences companies of all sizes to design and execute clinical trials at a scale and speed unmatched in the industry. As a Clinical Research Coordinator, you will serve as a critical link between study sponsors, investigators, and patients, ensuring that clinical trials are conducted with the highest standards of data quality, regulatory compliance, and participant safety. This hybrid role offers the opportunity to contribute to data-driven clinical research programs that shape the future of medicine.
responsibilities: Coordinate and manage day-to-day clinical trial activities in accordance with study protocols, GCP/ICH guidelines, and applicable regulatory requirements
Screen, recruit, and enroll study participants, conducting informed consent processes and ensuring eligibility criteria are met
Collect, enter, and verify clinical data using electronic data capture (EDC) systems, maintaining accuracy, completeness, and audit readiness
Prepare, organize, and maintain regulatory documentation including IRB submissions, protocol amendments, and essential regulatory binders
Serve as the primary point of contact for study participants, clinical staff, sponsors, and monitors, facilitating clear communication and timely resolution of queries

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences, Nursing, Public Health, or a related field
certifications: ACRP (CCRC) or SOCRA (CCRP) certification preferred but not required

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
Professional development programs and continuing education support
Flexible scheduling to support work-life balance in a hybrid environment
Employee assistance program (EAP) for personal and professional well-being
